chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, delivery information

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: at least one Order Line Item

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order.

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Active/Inactive Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: Boolean flag indicating whether the associated entity is currently active or enabled in its domain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: The ORDER_LINE_ITEM entity represents an individual line item in a sales order, containing details of a product included in that order and linked to both the order header and the product master data.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A formal document or record representing a customer or buyer's request to procure goods or services from a seller, triggering fulfillment and shipment.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347 | **Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line item on a Sales Order that specifies a product, the quantity ordered, and the unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A foreign key column in TB_CATEGORY named PARENT_CATEGORY_ID that stores the identifier of the parent category to form a hierarchical category relationship.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A payment record representing a monetary transaction applied to a specific Sales Order, identified by a unique PAYMENT_ID, with an amount; a Sales Order may have one or more payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
References exactly one Sales Order | Payment amount | Payment must be confirmed before order ships | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: Sales Order Header (SALES_ORDER_HDR): the table/entity representing a customer's sales order summary, identified by ORDER_ID and including the customer reference CUST_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order. | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Shipment is a single consignment associated with one Sales Order, identified by a unique shipment ID and carrying a carrier tracking number.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
References exactly one Sales Order | Tracking number | Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347 | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The primary key value that uniquely identifies a product in the TB_PRODUCT table (the product catalog).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale. | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master.Cust Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unique customer identifier (CUST_ID) serving as the primary key for the CUSTOMER_MASTER table's master record of all registered platform customers.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | - CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | | CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | | CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Whether Customer Can
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer is an individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Related Concepts**: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Sh

entities_post_resolution.name: Email
entities_post_resolution.definition: A database field representing the user's email address used as the login identifier, with a uniqueness constraint.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login)

entities_post_resolution.name: Geographic Region For
entities_post_resolution.definition: A geographic region code used to determine tax obligations and apply tax calculation rules in the business data model.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Master Record For
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer master data record containing core attributes and identifiers for all registered platform customers.
synonyms: Header record for each customer sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivery And Billing Addresses
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing the set of addresses associated with an entity for delivery and billing, allowing multiple addresses with one designated primary address for each type.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item in a sales order that specifies the product, the quantity ordered, and the unit price at the time of the order.
synonyms: Unit price at time of order
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | Quantity of units ordered | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: STATUS_CODE is a code field that represents the current status of an order or shipment in the business process, with values such as PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, and CANCELLED.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: A policy that governs the conditions under which customers can return products and receive a full refund (e.g., returns accepted within 30 days of purchase).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.definition:

- Unique Order ID

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identity, contact details, regional classification, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, SKU, name, category reference, price, and active status for catalog and sales use.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: This table stores category information for products, including each category's identifier, its name, and the reference to its parent category for hierarchical categorization.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores the header information for sales orders, including customer reference, order date, total amount, status, and timestamps for payment confirmation, delivery, and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-level details for each order, including the product, quantity, unit price, and line total amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments associated with customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for creation and confirmation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments, linking each shipment to its corresponding sales order, the warehouse handling the shipment, the shipment timestamp, tracking details, and current shipment status.
